# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder_6.7b-instruct)
# Prompt: Write Linkerd Server and ServerAuthorization resources for microservices. Define which services can communicate with each other. Configure port-based and service account-based authorization rules. This is for our zero-trust service mesh.
# Category: linkerd_authz_missing

apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: server1
  namespace: default
spec:
  hostname: server1.default.svc
---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: authorization1
  namespace: default
spec:
  serverRef:
    name: server1
    namespace: default
  policyRefs:
    - name: port-based-policy
---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: authorization2
  namespace: default
spec:
  serverRef:
    name: server1
    namespace: default
  policyRefs:
    - name: service-account-based-policy
